details.restore_scope: Restore the timestamp-matched Compose override and Mongo base-config backup, recreate only LibreChat-API, then verify the root, API config, CodeAPI health, Fable chat, and Office file reading.

details.description: Production LibreChat after generated-files download acceptance and before the Fable legacy tool-alias compatibility change

checks: Recorded Bash, Read, and Skill payload regression tests passed
Canonical and unknown tool calls remain unchanged
Mongo preflight, apply, verify, idempotence, preservation, and rollback tests passed
node --check passed for api-index.cjs, tool-call-normalizer.cjs, and mongo-config.js
bash -n passed for deploy.sh and remote-apply.sh
candidate api-index.cjs differs from the live baseline only at the normalization import and ON_TOOL_EXECUTE call path

change_summary.expected_result: When Fable emits the recorded Claude Code aliases for a file task, LibreChat deterministically invokes its registered bash_tool, read_file, and skill tools with the original code-session file context, so the model can read the complete current-turn DOCX from /mnt/data instead of stopping at the bounded manifest preview.
functions: Normalize Bash to bash_tool before event-driven tool loading
Preserve tool-call IDs, code-session context, and injected file references
Correct only the claude-fable-5 prompt to name the registered LibreChat tools
limitations: Grep remains unsupported and is not converted into a synthesized shell command
The Office manifest remains bounded at 20000 characters; complete reading continues through /mnt/data
The compatibility mapping is limited to the exact Bash, Read, and Skill aliases
change_summary.reason: Conversation 9b947fcc-8e44-4220-a48f-5e5a39a5a3b1 had valid codeEnvRef values and successful Office pre-parse, but Fable called Bash, Read, Skill, and Grep while LibreChat registered bash_tool, read_file, and skill. The stale Fable prompt also incorrectly instructed the model to use Bash.
change_summary.risk: Enhanced model-tool routing and base-config change. Incorrect normalization could load the wrong tool or alter arguments. The release uses exact alias and argument mappings, fixture tests from the production payloads, a fail-closed production baseline hash, Compose and Mongo backups, and API-only recreation.

details.command: Restore the timestamp-matched /opt/librechat/compose.override.yaml.bak-* and fable-tool-alias-* Mongo backup created by remote-apply.sh, recreate only LibreChat-API, then verify /, /api/config, CodeAPI health, Fable normal chat, and Office file reading.

details.api_error_log_check: No legacy Bash, Read, or Skill tool-not-found error in the post-deploy acceptance window.

validation_plan.command: node scripts/test-release.js and node scripts/test-mongo-config.js in the versioned patch directory
validation_plan.expected: Recorded Bash, Read, and Skill payloads normalize exactly; canonical and unknown tools remain unchanged; Mongo preflight/apply/verify/rollback preserve all unrelated configuration.

validation_plan.command: node --check, bash -n, git diff --check, and scripts/validate-release-governance.sh
validation_plan.expected: Candidate runtime files, deployment scripts, repository formatting, and all release-governance tests pass.

validation_plan.command: Authenticated vip998 Fable DOCX reading acceptance with at most one billable model request
validation_plan.expected: The current-turn DOCX is available under /mnt/data, a normalized tool executes successfully, a requested body passage is returned, and the acceptance window has no legacy Tool not found error for Bash, Read, or Skill.
